name: Obby 30: Color Rush
description: Are you ready to go from beginner to master? Obby 30: Color Rush is a classic 3D platformer that takes you through 30 flawlessly designed levels. Start in the easy green zones and fight your way through fiery red trials, where every platform tests your patience and precision. What awaits inside: • 30 Levels of Evolution: Feel your skills grow with every step. Level design isn’t just about traps — it’s about speed and reflex puzzles. • Star System: Simply finishing is only the beginning. Collect all the in-game stars to prove you are the true Obby champion! • Race Against Time: Confident in your speed? Run as fast as you can!
